title: The Beauty Shop
writer: Doty Hobart, Channing Pollock, Rennold Wolf
actors: Raymond Hitchcock, Billy B. Van, James J. Corbett
plot: Dr. Arbutus Budd is a New York physician specializing in "beauty". His business is successful but he is still plagued by money problems. One day he gets an idea--he obtains the coat-of-arms of a long-forgotten Italian noble family...
